name: Joe Courtney
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $418,598 for Joe Courtney in U.S. House, CT-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $418,598.
